name: 冯磊
bio: 柴火创客空间资深成员，负责基地车整体资源协调与团队支持。
bio_en: Senior member of Chaihuo Makerspace, responsible for overall resource coordination and team support.

name: 颜志鹏
bio: 全栈工程师，负责边缘计算系统规划与部署。
bio_en: Full-stack engineer, responsible for edge computing system design and deployment.

name: 张浩楠
bio: 内容记录与传播支持，负责用影像和文字记录基地车沿途的故事与现场。
bio_en: Content and communications support, documenting the MCV's journey and on-site stories through visuals and writing.

name: 邝钟伦
bio: 负责基地车技术系统的搭建与运维，为沿途创作提供稳定的技术支撑。
bio_en: Responsible for building and maintaining the MCV's technical systems, providing reliable support for on-site creation.

name: Ray
bio: 摄影师与内容创作者，用镜头记录基地车沿途的故事与人文。
bio_en: Photographer and content creator, documenting stories and culture along the journey.

name: 黎晓梅
bio: 内容创作者与传播策划，负责用影像、文字和社媒记录基地车的现场故事与创作瞬间。
bio_en: Content creator and communications planner, documenting the MCV's on-site stories and creative moments through visuals, writing, and social media.

name: Bianca
bio: 内容创作者，用影像与文字记录基地车一路的故事与创作现场。
bio_en: Content creator documenting the MCV's journey and creative moments through visuals and writing.

name: 马志乐
bio: 负责基地车技术系统支持与沿途技术协作。
bio_en: Supporting the MCV's technical systems and on-the-road collaboration.

name: 周彦彤
bio: 负责记录和传播基地车沿途故事。
bio_en: Documenting and sharing stories from the MCV's journey.

name: 叶雨
bio: 负责基地车行程协调与团队协作。
bio_en: Coordinating the MCV's route and team collaboration.
